## Caveats

- Study-level N is small (about 12 in the primary pool). All performance numbers are reported as proof-of-concept.
- LOSO-CV is the most defensible split given the data structure but has high variance.
- Fairness disparities computed on N about 6 per stratum are unstable; treat as descriptive.
- The primary scientific value of this stage is *interpretability* (SHAP rankings), not prediction.
